name: Cannelloni 1
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Saute the onions and mushrooms in butter until they are lightly browned. In a separate pan, mince the chicken meat and add it along with the chopped spinach to the onion and mushroom mixture. Stir in the nutmeg, salt, and pepper, then simmer for about 5 minutes. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before adding the ricotta cheese and cream. Mix thoroughly and season to taste.
Cook the noodles, three at a time, in boiling salted water until they are al dente. Using a skimmer, remove the cooked noodles from the water and blot them dry on both sides. Fill each noodle tube with a heaping tablespoon of the filling, making sure the seam side is down. Place the filled cannelloni in a buttered, oven-safe dish.
Cover the cannelloni with a generous amount of Italian-style tomato sauce, sprinkle with ground fresh basil, and add melted butter. Optionally, sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese or place a thin layer of mozzarella on top. Bake in the preheated oven for about ten minutes. Serve immediately, garnishing with additional sauce and grated Parmesan cheese.
